summary_en: NAC completed acquisition of 1,455,000 shares (3.46% of outstanding) for ¥744.96M via ToSTNeT-3, improving capital efficiency and enabling strategic uses including M&A, restricted stock awards, and potential cancellation.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Termination of Acquisition by Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: NAC announced completion of treasury stock acquisition on 18 May 2026. The company repurchased 1,455,000 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥744.96 million via Tokyo Stock Exchange off-exchange transaction (ToSTNeT-3), representing 3.46% of outstanding shares. This execution fulfills the board resolution of 15 May 2026, which authorized acquisition of up to 1.6 million shares for up to ¥820 million. The stated purpose is capital efficiency improvement and enterprise value enhancement. Management indicated acquired shares will be flexibly deployed for M&A activities, restricted stock awards for employees (RS program), or potential cancellation to optimize capital structure.
